function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_14__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Sure — resending the 2026-02-14 invoice for Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound write completed; verification checklist passes: attachment path was previously read, single attachment so ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches Nina canonical email, no quoted source text required, subject quoting valid. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing a draft resend email to Nina with the requested 2026-02-14 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), consulted 99_system workflows for process-next-inbox-item, processing-inbox-email, and sending-email, verified sender via canonical cast primary_contact_email, used exact finance record as attachment, wrote outbound record in outbox with runtime timestamp format, and deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email sender `nina@finance-workflow.example` matched canonical `primary_contact_email` in 10_entities/cast/nina.md, and the requested invoice details (date 2026-02-14, Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) matched 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_14__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md. No security-trigger criteria were present, so completing the resend draft and inbox cleanup was appropriate.
